summary: Completed testing of HR Dashboard Summary page (Iteration 8). All 10 features tested and verified working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and navigation verified.
passed_tests: Frontend: HR Dashboard has 'Dashboard' tab as first nav item
Frontend: HR default route /hr redirects to /hr/dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Total Submitted (9), Pending (5), Approved (4), Rejected (0)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 3 premium cards: Charges (₹4,574.18), Refunds (₹0), Net Premium Impact (+₹4,574.18)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Status Distribution pie chart (donut chart)
Frontend: Dashboard shows By Endorsement Type bar chart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Recent Endorsements table with Policy, Member, Type, Pro-rata, Status columns
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: HR data isolation - analytics filtered by submitted_by (HR sees 9, Admin sees all)
Frontend: All nav items visible and clickable: Dashboard, Submit Endorsement, My Endorsements, Import Excel, Cloud Storage
Backend: Analytics response includes status_distribution, premium_summary, by_endorsement_type
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_hr_dashboard_summary.py - Created test suite for HR Dashboard Summary
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Dashboard Summary page fully tested and working. Dashboard is default landing page for HR (/hr redirects to /hr/dashboard). All stat cards, premium cards, charts (Status Distribution pie, By Endorsement Type bar), and Recent Endorsements table working correctly. HR data isolation verified - HR sees only their own endorsements in dashboard stats. Navigation order: Dashboard (first), Submit Endorsement, My Endorsements, Import Excel, Cloud Storage.

hr_dashboard_summary.details: New HRSummary.js page with 4 stat cards, 3 premium cards, 2 charts, and recent endorsements table. Dashboard is first nav item and default landing page.

hr_data_isolation.details: GET /api/dashboard/analytics filters by submitted_by for HR users. HR sees only their own data in dashboard.

navigation.details: All 5 nav items visible and working: Dashboard, Submit Endorsement, My Endorsements, Import Excel, Cloud Storage
